title: Lungleiah National Technology Day 2026 pualin hun hman a ni
content:
483/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 12:Vawiin khan Lunglei Science Centre Auditorium, Zohnuai, Lungleiah Mizoram sawrkara Directorate of Science & Technology (DST) huaihawtin National Technology Day, 2026 lawmna hun hman a ni a. Mizoram Polytechnic Lunglei, Baptist Higher Secondary School, D & D Higher Seconary School leh Holy Faith School zirlaite nen hun hman a ni.

National Technology Day, 2026 lawmna hun hi Lunglei High Powered Committee (HPC) Member Pu R. Lalrochama'n a hmanpui a. Technology lama changkang leh ṭhang chak ram apiang chu ram changkang leh hmasawn an nih ṭhin thu sawiin, Mizoram pawhin hma lakna tur tam tak a la neih thu a sawi a. Ei leh bara intodelh ram nih turin thiamna (technology) changkang hmanga thlai chin leh lo neih dan te her rem a ngai tih sawiin, chumi atan chuan Science & Technology lama thawktute leh mi thiam Innovator-te'n ṭan an lak deuh deuh a pawimawh a ni, a ti.

DST-a Chief Scientific Officer Pu H. Lalsawmliana chuan hun kaihruaiin, National Technology Day chungchang a sawi zau va. Scientific Officer Pu Edward Lalzuithanga chuan "Responsible Innovation for Inclusive Growth" tih thupui hmangin thu a sawi a. Principal Scientific Officer Pu K. Lalrammuana'n lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

National Technology Day hi kum 1998-a India sawrkarin hlawhtling taka Operation Shakti (Pokhran-II nuclear enchhinna) a kalpui ni hriat reng nan India ram pumah kum 1999 aṭang khan kum tin May ni 11-ah hman ṭhin a ni a. India ram pum puiah zirlai naupangte leh mipui nawlpui zingah technology pawimawhna zau zawka puan darhna leh hmabak thui tak hlen chhuah tur inkawhhmuhna hun atan te hman ṭhin a ni.

Attachment

title: DoNER SECRETARY SHRI SANJAY JAJU-IN CHAMPHAI A TLAWH
content:
482/2026-2027

Champhai, dated 12th May, 2026: Pu Sanjay Jaju, Secretary, Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region (DoNER) chuan vawiin khan Champhai District tlawhin hun a hmang.

DoNER Secretary Pu Sanjay Jaju hi Champhai District Agricultural Marketing Committee (DAMC) member leh SCC hruaitute'n an lo hmuak a, Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan sawhthing hralh chungchanga Champhai dinhmun te a sawi lang nghal a. Hemi zawh hian Secretary Pu Sanjay Jaju chuan Champhaia horticulture leh food processing lama hmun pawimawh te leh siam mek te heng - Winery, Zote; Passion Fruit Processing Unit New Champhai; leh Goverment Oak Tasar Seed Farm Tlangsam te a hmunah kalin a enfiah a, heng bakah hian Zomi Cultural Centre & Preservation of Zomi Historical Sites, Tlangnuam Veng a tlawh bawk.

Hemi hnu hian Champhai District a Department hotute kawmna a neih hnuah Aizawl a pan leh nghal a ni. Pu Sanjay Jaju hi Horticulture Secretary Pi Maria CT Zuali'n a tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: CHAMPHAI DISTRICT-AH ‘PROJECT LEAD’ HNUAIA ZIRNA TIHHMASAWN NAN CONSULTATION WORKSHOP NEIH A NI
content:
481/2026-2027

Champhai, May 12, 2026: Vawiin khan Education Training Hall, Kahrawt Veng-ah Champhai District chhunga zirna tihhmasawnna tura ruahman, Project LEAD (Literacy & Education Advancement in District Champhai) chungchang zirhona ‘Consultation Workshop’ neih a ni a, Pi K. Lalsiamliani, District Education Officer (DEO), Champhai-in a kaihruai a ni.

He hunah hian Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu sawiin, zirna hmasawnna tura hetiang ruahman thar a awm chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. District chhunga zirna dinhmun siamtha turin zirtirtute leh thuneitute'n lungrual taka hma lak a pawimawh thu a tarlang bawk. Zirtirtu lo kal te chuan workshop hlawkthlak taka hmang a, zirlaite hmakhua ngai chunga zirna lungphum dik phum tura an ngaihtuahna te seng turin a chah a ni.

Pu Lalchhuanawma Ralte, SDC, Champhai chuan 'Project LEAD' kalphung leh a tum (objectives) sawifiahna hun a hmang a. Pu Bijoy Sankar Das, Head-North Eastern States, Azim Premji Foundation chuan workshop-a thupui ber (highlights) te tarlangin, he project hnuaia hma lakna tur chi hrang hrang a tarlang bawk. Pu Lalthlamuana Tochhawng, SDEO, Champhai chuan lawmthu sawiin a hun khar a ni.

Project LEAD hi DIET Champhai leh District Education Office te tangkawpin mawhphurhna lain an kalpui dawn a, PARAKH Rashtriya Sarvekshan 2024-in a tarlan zirlaite thiamna tlakhniamna (learning gaps) te sukiang a, zirna hnar (foundational learning) tihchak a tum ber a ni a. Primary School-ah Naupangte'n chhiar leh ziah leh chhiarkawpah te hmasawnna an neih theihna turin 'Foundational Literacy and Numeracy (FLN)' kalpui te, Middle School-ah Science leh Maths kit-sem te, zirlaite kut ngeia experiment an tih theih nan hma lak te, High School-ah High school 39-ah supplementary science kits sem a , zirtirtute thiamna chherhriam tura training te hi a thiltum ber chu a ni.

Workshop-ah hian Champhai Block leh Khawbung Block huam chhunga zirtirtute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Adviser to CM (Technical) Er. H. Ginzalala'n Lailiphai leilung zirchianna mithiamte nen a nei
content:
480/2026-2027

Champhai, dated 12th May 2026:Adviser to CM (Technical) leh Champhai North bialtu MLA ni bawk Er. H Ginzalala leh Senior Scientist ICAR-IGFRI, Jhansi mithiam rual ten Champhai a Ran chaw chinna hmun leh Lailiphai leilung te an zirchiang

A Bial chhung hmun hrang hrang tlawh a cham mek MLA Er. H Ginzalala leh a team te chuan Champhai a Ran chaw tur chinna hmun te leh Lailiphai, Hnahlan leilung te chu a hmunah kalin an zirchiang a, he hun hmang tur hian mithiam rual Dr. Arun Kumar Shukla, Principal Scientist & Head, GSM Division, Dr. Purushotam Sharma, PS and Head, Plant Animal Relationship Division leh Dr. Amit Kumar Singh, Scientist te chu chah chhuah an ni.

Vawiin khan Champhai Zote a K Laldawngliana Fodder plantation chu an tlawh a. Ran chaw tur atan bik a chin Nappier grass te chu a hmunah Scientist rual te nen en ho in, hlawk zawk leh ṭha zawk a tharchhuah a nih theih dan tur te, mi tam zawkin an hman ṭangkai dan tur bakah, a enkawl dan turte an ngaihtuah ho a, Plantation enkawltu te hnenah ṭangkai tur zirtirna te an pe a ni.

Vawiin vek khan MLA Team te hian Hnahlan Lailiphai chu tlawhin Agriculture link road siak mek an endik nghal a. Hemi hnu hian mi thiam bik Senior Scientist rual te chuan Lailiphai leilung te chu a theih ang ang a zirchiangin, Leilung mila thlai chin tur te, Ranchaw hlawk zawka tharchhuah dan tur te, Leilung mila thlai chin enkawl dan tur thlengin an zirchiang a. Lo neitu te hnenah a theih ang anga zirtirna pe nghalin heng leilung a an chin thil engpawh enkawl chhunzawm dan tur zirtirna an pe nghal a ni.

Hnahlan Lailiphaiah hian Thlasik thei, Mizorama kan chin ngai loh, Vur pawh ngam Thei te chi hrang hrang chinga enchhinna neih a ni dawn a, heng hmaklakna te hian Lo neitu te chu a ti phur hle a ni. Hemi hnu hian Horticulture plantation chu a hmunah kalin an enfiah bawk a ni.

MLA Er. H. Ginzalala hi Senior Scientist rual bakah hian Pu Malsawmtharzela, JE Agriculture & FWD; Department mi leh sa te leh lo neitute chuan an ṭawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Lunglei Ramtharah 40 Days Healthy Lunglei Campaign hnuaiah hriselna chungchang inzirtirna leh hriselna dinhmun endikna buatsaih a ni
Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii'n NABARD RIDF sum cheng nuai 601.34 senga sak Sub-District Hospital Tlabung building thar a hawng
RD & AD MINISTER PROF. LALNILAWMA' N COMMUNITY MANAGED TRAINING CENTRE LEH  GENDER RESOURCE CENTRE - SANGAU HAWNG
content:
478/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 12th May 2026:Vawiin khan Rural Development & Administration Department Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan khuallian niin 'Community Managed Training Centre (CMTC)' leh 'Gender Resource Centre (GRC)' Sangau a hawng a. Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah Adviser to Chief Minister leh Lawngtlai East bialtu MLA nibawk chuan khualzahawm niin a hmanpui.

Prof. Lalnilawma chuan a mamawhtuten tangkai taka an hman leh malsawmna thlentu ni tura  lawm taka 'Community Managed Training Centre' leh Gender Resource Centre - a hawn thu a sawi a. CMTC leh GRC - chu Sangau RD Block - tana hmasawnna thlentu pawimawh tak a nih a beisei thu sawiin, a taka chhawr tangkai thiam a tul dawn hle a ti a. Sawrkarin khawtlang tan thil tha tak tak a siam thin a, chutih rualin a  enkawlzui lamah hmasawnna a awm lo thin hle tiin,  a enkawl lamah thahnemngaih  a tul hle tiin, a bik takin Far Pak Cluster Level Federation- te chu duat leh hmangaih taka enkawl turin a chah a ni.

Khuallian chuan CMTC  Buliding hnuai bera computer zirna tur room  siam chu thil tha tak a nih thu sawiin, theihtawp chhuah a tum thu a sawi a. Sangau khawtlangin harsatna an tawh lian tak pakhat  tui lama harsatna an neih pawh bawhzui a tum thu a sawi a ni. Nu hoin  khawtlangah tangkaina lian tak an nei a, ram leh hnam hmasawnna turin theihtawp an chhuah fo thin tih tarlangin, khawtlang leh ram tana theihtawp chhuah zel turin a fuih a. Self Help Group - ten an thil tharchhuahte man man zawka hralh a nih theih nan sawrkarin theihtawp a chhuah reng thu sawiin, SHG- te thahnemngai taka thawk zel turin a chah a. Ei leh bar kawnga intodelh a pawimawh thu sawiin, Prof. Lalnilawma chuan Sangau RD Block hnuaia SHG - te ngaituahna thar nena  theihtawp chhuaha  thawk zel turin a fuih nghal bawk a ni.

Khualzahawm Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah chuan sawrkar hmalakna pawimawh tak a nih angin, khawtlang mipuite pawhin hlut thiam a tul hle a ti a. A enkawltu tur  Far Pak Cluster Level Federation- te pawhin thahnemngai taka enkawl a tul dawn tiin, duat taka enkawl turin a fuih a. CMTC leh GRC- chuan khawtlangah hmasawnna a thlen ngei a beisei tlat tih tarlangin, a hmangtangkaitu tur zawng zawngte duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk a ni.

Pu V. Lalengmawia, Addl.Secretary, RD& AD pawhin thu tawi sawiin, Nu hoten tangkai taka an hman tur a nih angin khawtlang pawhin an chhawr dawn hle a ti a. A enkawl kawngah neitu thinlung pu a, theihtawp chhuah zel turin a chah nghal a. Pi F. Remsangliani, President, Pak Cluster Level Federation  pawhin thutawi a sawi bawk a ni.

Pi Zosangzuali Pachuau, CEO, MzSLRM chuan report pekna a nei a. Community Managed Training Centre' leh 'Gender Resource Centre' Sangau chu ni 15 January 2025 - ah sak tan niin August 2025 ah sak zawh a ni, a ti a. A sak nan hian cheng  nuai 35 sen niin,  a chhung cheina atan cheng  nuai riat singa sen a nih thu a sawi a. He Centre - hi Far Pak Cluster Level Federation (SHG)  - te enkawl tur a nih thu a tarlang bawk.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian CLF Member - te leh khawtlang hruaitute an telkim tha hle a, Pu H. Zonunmaiwa, PD, DRDO, Lawngtlai District chuan hun  kaihhruaiin, kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Pu Thomas Maratha Hlychho, BDO,Sangau chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

RD & AD Minister hian BDO Office, Sangau  tlawh nghalin BDO leh Staff - ten an lo dawngsawng a. Minister hi Pu V. Lalengmawia, Additional Secretary, RD&AD, Pi Zosangzuali Pachuau, CEO MzSLRM, ten Aizawl atangin an lo  tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: EXCEPTIONAL MOTHER AWARD PI A. LALAWMPUII HNENAH HLAN A NI
content:
477/2026-2027

Serchhip, the 12th May, 2024:Vawiin khan District Programme Officer (DPO), Women & Child Development (WCD) Department, Serchhip District chuan Mother’s Day denchhenin Serchhip khuaa nu chhuanawm (exceptional mother) chawimawina hun DC Office Chamber-ah an hmang a, Pi A. Lalawmpuii hnenah he chawimawina hi hlan niin Serchhip Deputy Commissioner  Pu Paul L. Khuma’n a hlan a ni.

Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan Pi Lalawmpuii chu nu chhuanawm tak a nih thu sawiin he chawimawina hi a phu hle tih a sawi a. ‘A fapa vohbik hlawhtling taka lehkha zir tira, sawrkar hna tha tak hmu thei khawpa a enkawl seilen mai bakah, Shalom Special School-a naupang dangte a hun puma enkawl zui zel tura a inpekna chuan chawimawi a phu hle a ni’, a ti.

Vawiina Exceptional Mother chawimawina hun hi Serchhip District Programme Officer Pi Lalthlamuani Rokhum-in a kaihhruai a, District Mission Coordinator Pu R. Lalvensanga hnen atangin chawimawina dawng tura thlan chhuah a nih dan ngaihthlak a ni. Pi A. Lalawmpuii hnenah hian chawimawina thuziak (Memento) leh lawmman pawisa fai ₹5,000/- hlan a ni.

Pi A. Lalawmpuii hi Serchhip Venglaia cheng niin fa pali a nei a, a fapa upa ber Vanlalnghaka Chhangte hi a naupan tet atanga rualbanlo (Vohbik) - Cerebral Palsy (Spastic Quadriplegia) niin, chuti chung chuan zirna lamah hlawhtling taka chher chhuakin, tunah hian PWD Department ah Junior Engineer (J.E) ni thei hial khawpin a chher chhuak a ni. Tin, Vohbik school -Shalom Special School, Serchhip chu kum 2005 ah khan a dintute zingah telin tunah hian Head in charge in a awm mek a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah District Development Co-ordination & Monitoring Committee (DISHA) an ṭhu khawm
Commerce & Industries Minister-in State Level Internal Consultative Workshop hmanpui
content:
477/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 12th May 2026:Vawiin khan Textiles industry in hma a sawn theih nan State Level Consultative Workshop chu Planning & Programme Implementation Department Conference Hall, Treasury Square-ah neih a ni a. Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining Department changtu Minister Pu F. Rodingliana chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Minister chuan he consultative workshop a telpui thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Industry than zel theihna atana power supply a pawimawhzia sawiin, chung mamawhna phuhru tur chuan power lamah pawh Mizoram intodelh theihna turin hma a lak zel thu te, industry chuan an hnathawh zar an zo ngei a beisei thu te a sawi bawk a. “Mizote chu handloom lamah kan sang a, GI tag hial kan neih tawhna Puanchei, Pawndum, Tawlhlohpuan, Ngotekherh leh Hmaram te chu kan Mizo culture keng nungtu an ni”, tiin Pu F. Rodingliana chuan a ti. Kan rama raw materials (leilung hausakna) kan neih ve te (a bikin mau leh changel) tangkai taka kan hman theih a rin thu Minister chuan a sawi a. Mizoramin hma a sawn zelna tur te, thalaite chawikanna atan leh hna tam zawk siam theihna turin industry chu a pawimawh a ni, a ti bawk.

He programme hi Ministry of Textiles atangin Joint Textile Commissioner Pu Sarveshwar Bhure chuan online-a telpuiin, India sawrkar chuan kum 2030-ah Textiles industry atanga export (thawn chhuah) zat chu USD 100 billion han hawlh thei turin a beisei a, Mizoram pawhin he target-ah hian nasa takin a contribute (thawh) ve thei a ni, a ti a. Mizoram chu handloom leh handicrafts lama an san thu leh tun aia hma an sawn zel theihna tur kawngah India sawrkar laipui chuan puih a inhuam reng thu a sawi bawk.

He hun hi Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining Department Secretary Pu Dr. H. Lianzela chuan Chairman niin a kaihruai a. Textiles hmang hian kan hnam rohlu phochhuah a nih zel theih a beisei thu a sawi a. Workshop-ah hian a hnuaia topic hrang hrang tarlan hmang hian zirhona hun hman a ni:

1.District and Cluster-led export Strategy

2.Producer Diversification, Design and Value Addition

3.Exporter Enablement and FTA Utilisation

4.Credit, Logistics, Infrastructure, Skills Enablement

5.Sustainability, ESG & Data Systems

He workshop-ah hian Textiles sector hnuaia Handloom, Handicrafts, Apparel leh Sericulture lama sawrkar mi pawimawh leh stakeholder eng emaw zat an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram State Policy Coordination Committee (MSPCC) in Handholding Scheme hnuaia dilna enfiah
PU TBC LALVENCHHUNGAN HELEN LOWRY HIGHER SECONDARY SCHOOL GRADUATION COMMENCEMENT PROGRAM A HMANPUI
content:
476/2026-2027

Aizawl, ni 12 May, 2026:Vawiin khan Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga, MLA leh Adviser to Chief Minister (Finance & Planning) chuan Helen Lowry Higher Secondary School 28th Graduation Commencement Program, "Reaching New Heights" tih thupui hmanga an school auditorium, Seventh Day Tlanga buatsaih chu khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Zirlaite hmaah thu sawiin Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga chuan, hun hi a liam chak hle mai a, a uiawm a ni. Chuvangin kan kalna lama hlawhtlinna kan chan thuai theih nan tumruhna leh taihmakna a pawimawh hlein ka hria a. Ka hun lo hman tawh dante ka ngaihtuahlet pawhin a dikin ka hria a ni.

Tuna in hun tawn mek hi eng stream nge thlan tur, eng hna nge thawh tur tih leh eng kawng nge zawh tur tih ngaihtuaha rilru a hah hun lai a ni a. Thian thate leh chhungte nawrna avanga mahni tui zawng ni miah lo thlan palhte pawh a hlauhawm. A hlawkna lam ringawt ngaihtuah a, mahni tuina ni miah lo kawng thlan palh chuan inchhirna a thlen thei a, hun kan khawhral thei bawk a. Chuvangin, eng hna nge thawk ila ka tan tha ang tih ngaihtuahna tak tak sen thiam a tha a. Chhungkuaa sawiho fo tur a ni, a ti.

Zirlaite chu harsatna hmachhawn ngam tur leh inelna sang tak hmachhawn ngam tura fuihin, inbuatsaihna tha neih a pawimawh reng a, chhel a ngai bawk thin. Beidawng mai thinte hi an hlawhtling mawh hle a, vawi tam tak hlawhchham hnu pawha beinawn zel peihte hi an lo ding chang nge nge thin a ni, tiin beidawng mai mai lo turin a fuih a. Zirlai pass thar zawng zawngte lawmpuina a hlan a ni.

He hunah hian Headmaster, Pu Rotluanga Tochhawng hnen atangin School Report ngaihthlak a ni a. HSSLC-ah pass percentage 87.50% an nei a, zirlai 224 exam-ah 196 an pass a ni.

Report-a a lan danin stream hrang hranga an result chu hetiang hi a ni:

Commerce Stream: 100% pass.

Arts Stream: 85.53% pass.

Science Stream: 82.76% pass.

HSLC lamah pass percentage 94% an nei a, zirlai 84 exam-ah 79 an pass a. Distinction-ah 10, First Division-ah 30, Second Division-ah 26, leh Third Division-ah 13 an pass a ni.

Helen Lowry School hi January 17, 1950 khan Pastor leh Mrs. Lowry ten District Superintendent bungalow-ah zirlai 10 lek neiin an din a. Mizorama English Medium School hmasa ber a ni a, kum 2000 khan Higher Secondary School-ah hlan kai a ni.

Graduation ceremony hi Pastor Rodingliana, President of the Mizo Conference of SDA chuan khualzahawm niin a telpui a ni.

Attachment

title: I&PR Director-In Lunglei Tlawhin District Office Mamawh Hrang Hrang A Enpui
content:
475/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 12:Mizoram sawrkara Information & Public Relations (I&PR) Director Pi K. Vanlalsangi chuan vawiin khan District Information & Public Relations Office, Lunglei tlawhin, District office dinhmun a enfiah bakah, an mamawh hrang hrang a enpui.

I&PR Director hi District Information & Public Relations Officer Pu C. Lalhruaitluanga hovin I&PR-a thawktute'n an lo dawngsawng a. Office hmunhma en hovin, office tihchangtlunna tur leh thil pawimawh hrang hrang an sawi ho.

I&PR Director Pi K. Vanlalsangi chuan I&PR Office Lungleia thawktute'n department leh ram tana theih tawp an chhuah ṭhinnaah lawm thu sawiin, ṭhahnem ngai taka thawk zel turin a chah a. Thawktute zingah thawh hona ṭha chhawm nung zel tur leh office hmunhma leh bungruate chu uluk tak leh ṭha taka enkawl chhunzawm zel turin a chah bawk.

I&PR Director hian Lunglei Office-a Conference Hall chei ṭhat mek chhunzawmna tur sum a hlan nghal a. DIPRO Pu C. Lalhruaitluanga leh thawktute chuan Director leh department hotute'n an ngaihsakna leh duhsak ṭhinnaah lawm thu an sawi.

Attachment

title: Fisheries Leh Central YMA In Thawhhona Thuthlung Ziak
content:
474/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 12th May, 2026 :Vawiin khan Fisheries Minister Pu Lalthansanga Pisa-ah Fisheries Department leh Central YMA ten Luidung Humhalh tura thawhhona thuthlung an ziak. Fisheries Department aiawhin Director Pi Zonuntluangi’n hming a ziak a, Central YMA aiawhin President Pu R. Lalngheta’n hming a ziak a ni.

Fisheries Minister Pu Lalthansanga chuan Fisheries Department tan luidung zawng zawng vil a harsat thu sawiin, “Kan rama Tlawmngai pawl lian ber YMA ten kan luidung humhalh nachang hria a, Branch ten theihtawp a mahni huamchhungah hma an lo la thin chu a lawmawm hle a ni”, a ti.  Lungrual taka Fisheries Department leh YMA te thawhhona hian rah tha a lo chhuah tawh thin a,  kum 2 an thawhho lehna turah hian Fisheries Acts leh Rules hnuaiah awmze nei leh tangkai zawka Mizoram luidung hausakna hman kawngah hma an sawn phah ngei a beisei thu a sawi a ni.

Inkhawm kaihruaitu Fisheries Secretary Er. Lalrothanga chuan YMA te nena thawhhona tha tak an nei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Sangha vulh kawnga farmer te hmasawn zelna tur leh Mizorama sangha tam zawk thar chhuahna atan hman tangkai a tul thu sawiin tha zawka thawhho zel a beisei thu a sawi a ni.

Fisheries Department leh Central YMA hian kum 2021 atang khan Thawhhona Thuthlung hi kum 2 atan zel an lo ziak tawh thin a, tunah hian a tum 3 na atan thawhhona thuthlung hi an ziak leh a ni.

He thawhhona hian Mizoram luidung nungcha venhim leh humhalh kawngah nasa takin rah tha a chhuah zel a, tunah hian YMA Branch 93 zetin luidung humhalh bik an nei a. He an hmalakna avang hian Mizoram Luidungah sangha an pun phah mek zel a. Chu bakah luidung humhalh inzirtirna kawngah te, luidung venhim leh dan phal loh hmanrua hmanga sangha man chingte manchhuah kawngah Fisheries Department ten chak zawkin hma an lak theih phah a ni.

Attachment

title: Padma Awards Dawng Tur Rawt Theih
content:
473/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 12thMay, 2026 :Sawrkar Laipuia Ministry of Home Affairs chuan India rama civil mi te chawimawina sang Padma Awards chi hrang hrang “Padma Vibhushan, Padma Bhushan leh Padma Shri” dawng thei tur a zawng mek a, heng Award dawng tlak leh dawng thei tur ni a hriat rawt tur nei chuan District tina DC Office ah June ni 25, 2026 ral hma in thehluh theih a ni a. Online-a thehlut duh tanhttp://awards.gov.inah thehluh theih a ni bawk.

Padma Awards dawng tur hian Art, Literature, Education, Sports, Medicine, Social Work, Science & Engineering, Public Affairs, Civil Service, Trade & Industry etc. a mi hmingtha te rawt theih a ni a, sawrkar hnathawk leh Public Sector Units a thawkte zingah Doctor leh Scientist te chauh rawt theih an ni thung. Padma Award dawng tura Sawrkar Laipuiin a pawm te chu Republic Day, 2016 ah an hming puan a ni ang.

title: UNION MINISTER OF LAW AND JUSTICE MEETS NGOS AND COMMUNITY LEADERS IN MAMIT
content:
71/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit, 12 May 2026:The Union Minister of Law and Justice, Arjun Ram Meghwal, today held an important interaction meeting with NGO representatives and community leaders at the Tourist Lodge in Mamit.

During the meeting, the Minister met with leaders from major civil society organisations including MHIP, YMA, MUP, Village Council (VC), and MZP. He listened to the grievances, challenges, and concerns raised by the representatives regarding the welfare and development of the people in the district.

Addressing the gathering, Pu Arjun Ram Meghwal stated that the Central Government remains committed to supporting the people of Mizoram and assured that all possible assistance would be extended wherever necessary. He emphasized that solving the problems faced by the public and ensuring better governance are among the government’s highest priorities. The Minister appreciated the important role played by NGOs and community-based organisations in maintaining social harmony, supporting development initiatives, and working for the welfare of the people.

The programme was also attended by Pu Suvigya S. Chandra, Deputy Commissioner of Mamit district, and Pu Manny Bhushan Singh, Superintendent of Police (SP), Mamit. Both officials assured the gathering that the district administration and police department are committed to addressing public grievances promptly and effectively.

Attachment

title: UNION MINISTER OF LAW AND JUSTICE IN MAMIT NGO LEH KHAWTLANG HRUAITUTE KAWM
content:
471/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 12th of May,2026:Vawiin khan Tourist Lodge, Mamit-ah Union Minister of Law and Justice Pu Arjun Ram Meghwal chuan Mamit khawtlang hruaitute leh NGO te a kawm.

Pu Arjun Ram Meghwal chuan MHIP, YMA,MUP, VC leh MZP hruaitute chu kawmin an harsatna te a ngaihthlak sak a, Sawrkar Laipuiin theih anga puih a tum thu sawiin mipuite harsatna sutkian chu Sawrkar in a tum ber a ni a ti. Union Minister hian NABARD hruaitute hmuin an hnathawh te a enpui bawk.

Vawiin hunah hian Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap leh Pu Manny Bhushan Singh, SP Mamit chu telin mipuiin harsatna an neih chu a rang lama bawhzui an tum thu sawiin harsatna an neihah te office pan hreh lo turin an fuih bawk.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB LEH BAIRABI TUILAK KAWP (COMBINED SCHEME) CHUNGCHANGAH PHED HOTUTEN TLAWNG LUI AN ENFIAH
content:
470/2026-2027

Kolasib, 12th May, 2026:Ni 8 May, 2026 (Zirtawpni) khan PHED Chief Engineer, Zone-I Er. Lalropuia leh Chief Engineer, Zone-II Er. K. Zohmingliana te chuan Kolasib leh Bairabi khaw tana Tlawng lui (Bairabi hrul) atanga tui lak theih dan tur a hmunah kalin an enfiah a. He hunah hian Er. Lalrosangi, Sr. Executive Engineer, Kolasib WATSAN Division, PHED bakah SDO leh JE ten an lo tawiawm a ni.

India sawrkar dan (norms) ah chuan Kolasib leh Bairabi te hi khawpui (Town) an nih avangin mi pakhatin nitin tui litre 135 an dawng tur a ni a. Tun dinhmunah Kolasib tana tui lak mekna Tuichhuahen atang chuan he tiang zat tui hi pek chhuah theih a nih hmel loh avangin, Tlawng lui hi rawn lak tel (pump) nise tih ngaihtuahna hi a lo awm tawh a ni.

Ruahmanna tlangpui ang chuan, Zamuang panna lei (bridge) bul vel atangin Tlawng lui tui hi pump tur a ni a. Bairabi khaw chung remchang hnaivaiah, Bairabi a luang thleng thei tur hmunah vawrh chhoh phawt beisei a ni. Chuta tang chuan Bairabi khuaah awlsam takin tui hi a luang thleng mai dawn a ni. Kolasib lam ve thung chu tui vawrh chhohna hmun atang hian Tuichhuahen Pump House awmsa bul hnaiah kilometer 23 vela thui pipe hmangin lak luh a ni ang a. Tuichhuahen atang hian Kolasib-a Pioneer Tlangah vawrh chhoh leh tur a ni dawn a ni.

He ruahmanna thar hi a puitling a nih chuan, tuna Kolasib tui pump mek chu hlui hlawn chuang lovin, a pahniha hmang kawpin Kolasib leh Bairabi mipuite chu kum 2058 (kum 30 lo awm tur) thleng harsa lo leh hnianghnar taka tui chawm thei tura beisei a ni.

He project lian tham tak atan hian a tlem berah cheng vaibelchhe 205 (Rs. 205 crores) vel mamawh tura duan chhin a ni a, detailed survey leh estimate siam a nih hunah a la pung thei bawk a ni. Sum mamawh zat a tam tham avangin sum hmuhna tur dap hna hi nasa taka thawh a la ngai dawn a. PHED chuan Kolasib leh Bairabi mipuite tana he project hi tihhlawhtlin sak ngei tumin theihtawpin hma a la chho mek a ni.

Attachment
